---
title: "fromPushNotification()"
description: "Wrap a host push transport. The host owns network/native setup; this factory owns reactive delivery and teardown only, preserving async-at-source-boundary discipline."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Wrap a host push transport. The host owns network/native setup; this factory owns reactive
delivery and teardown only, preserving async-at-source-boundary discipline.

## Import

```ts
import { fromPushNotification } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources/browser";
```

## Signature

```ts
function fromPushNotification(register: PushRegister<T>): Operator<never, T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `register` | `PushRegister<T>` | Missing @param register JSDoc. |

## Returns

`Operator<never, T>`
